home.title: Toqui
home.subtitle: Plan smarter trips with AI-powered local experts. Get personalized recommendations, manage bookings, and navigate like a local.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need for better trips
home.feature1Desc: Chat with AI local guides, food critics, history buffs, and more — each one specialized in their destination.
home.feature2Desc: Just chat about what you want. Toqui builds your itinerary as you talk — no forms to fill out.
home.feature3Desc: Your conversations become day-by-day plans, automatically organized with times, locations, and tips.
home.feature4Desc: Paste or forward confirmation emails and AI extracts all the details into your trip automatically.
home.feature5Desc: Get live recommendations, directions, and local tips while you travel — your pocket travel expert.
home.feature6Desc: From hidden gems to popular spots, discover the best of every destination with personalized suggestions.
home.step1Desc: Describe where you want to go and what you're into. Toqui matches you with the right expert personas.
home.step2Desc: Have a natural conversation. Get restaurant picks, activity ideas, and logistics sorted out as you chat.
home.step3Desc: Your itinerary and bookings are all in one place. Switch to companion mode for real-time help on the go.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to plan your next trip?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of travelers planning smarter trips with Toqui. Free to start, no credit card required.
home.welcomeTitle: Where do you want to go?
home.welcomeSubtitle: Pick a destination or create your own trip

templates.title: Popular Trips
templates.noResults: No templates found. Try a different search.

parisWeekend.title: Weekend in Paris
parisWeekend.description: A romantic getaway through the City of Light. Stroll along the Seine, explore charming neighborhoods, and savor world-class cuisine.
parisWeekend.suggestedPrompt: Plan a romantic weekend in Paris. I'd love to visit iconic landmarks, find cozy cafes, and experience the best of Parisian culture. Include restaurant recommendations and evening activities.

tokyoExplorer.title: Tokyo Explorer
tokyoExplorer.description: Dive into Tokyo's incredible mix of ancient tradition and cutting-edge modernity. From temples to street food to neon-lit districts.
tokyoExplorer.suggestedPrompt: Plan a week exploring Tokyo. I want to experience both traditional culture (temples, gardens) and modern Tokyo (Shibuya, Akihabara). Include the best street food spots and day trip options.

baliBeach.title: Bali Beach & Temples
baliBeach.description: Discover Bali's stunning beaches, ancient temples, and lush rice terraces. Perfect for adventure seekers and culture lovers alike.
baliBeach.suggestedPrompt: Plan a 10-day Bali trip mixing beach relaxation with temple visits and rice terrace treks. Include Ubud, Seminyak, and Uluwatu. Suggest the best surf spots and local warungs.

nycCity.title: New York City
nycCity.description: Experience the energy of the Big Apple. World-class museums, Broadway shows, iconic neighborhoods, and incredible food from every corner of the globe.
nycCity.suggestedPrompt: Plan a 4-day NYC trip covering Manhattan highlights, Brooklyn exploration, and the best food scenes. Include must-see museums, shows, and neighborhood walks.

italianRoadTrip.title: Italian Road Trip
italianRoadTrip.description: Drive through Italy's stunning landscapes from the Amalfi Coast to Tuscany's rolling hills. Discover hidden villages, vineyards, and centuries of history.
italianRoadTrip.suggestedPrompt: Plan a 2-week road trip through Italy starting from Rome. Cover the Amalfi Coast, Tuscany, Florence, Venice, and the Italian Lakes. Include driving tips, scenic routes, and local trattorias.

barcelonaCostaBrava.title: Barcelona & Costa Brava
barcelonaCostaBrava.description: Explore Barcelona's architectural wonders and then escape to the Costa Brava's hidden coves and medieval villages.
barcelonaCostaBrava.suggestedPrompt: Plan a 5-day trip starting in Barcelona with Gaudi landmarks, tapas bars, and the Gothic Quarter, then head to Costa Brava for beach days and coastal villages.

thailandBackpacking.title: Thailand Backpacking
thailandBackpacking.description: Backpack through Thailand from bustling Bangkok to northern mountains and southern islands. Adventure, culture, and incredible food on a budget.
thailandBackpacking.suggestedPrompt: Plan a 2-week backpacking trip through Thailand covering Bangkok, Chiang Mai, and the southern islands. I'm on a budget and want a mix of culture, adventure, and beach time. Include transport tips between cities.

londonFamily.title: London Family Holiday
londonFamily.description: A family-friendly week in London packed with museums, parks, and unforgettable experiences that kids and adults will both love.
londonFamily.suggestedPrompt: Plan a week-long family trip to London with 2 kids (ages 8 and 12). Include kid-friendly museums, parks, Harry Potter experiences, and restaurants that are great for families. Mix in some classic sightseeing.

greekIslands.title: Greek Islands
greekIslands.description: Island-hop through the Aegean Sea. Whitewashed villages, crystal-clear waters, ancient ruins, and legendary sunsets await.
greekIslands.suggestedPrompt: Plan a 10-day Greek island-hopping trip. Include Santorini, Mykonos, and one less-touristy island. I want romantic sunsets, great seafood, beautiful beaches, and some ancient history.

moroccoDiscovery.title: Morocco Discovery
moroccoDiscovery.description: Journey through Morocco's vibrant medinas, vast Sahara dunes, and Atlas Mountain villages. A feast for all the senses.
moroccoDiscovery.suggestedPrompt: Plan a week-long trip through Morocco covering Marrakech, Fes, the Sahara Desert, and the Atlas Mountains. Include riad recommendations, food tours, and cultural experiences.
